You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.41 (commit: 1281a8b6).

## Issue to Resolve

Improve wording of no connection message
We use the strings "No network available" (title) and "There is no network available" (message) together in several places when we detect there's no network connection. As mentioned [here](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/pull/21275#discussion_r1790413203), this is redundant and unhelpful. We should use better wording, or simply use only the title string and no message.

  2â†’
  3â†’import android.content.Context
  4â†’import com.tenor.android.core.constant.MediaCollectionFormat
  5â†’import com.tenor.android.core.model.impl.Result
  6â†’import org.wordpress.android.R

  8â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaItem.Identifier.GifMediaIdentifier
  9â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.MediaType.IMAGE
 10â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult
 11â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Empty
 12â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Failure
 13â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.mediapicker.loader.MediaSource.MediaLoadingResult.Success
 14â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 15â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 16â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 17â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.UriUtilsWrapper
 18â†’import javax.inject.Inject
 19â†’import kotlin.coroutines.resume
 20â†’import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
 21â†’
 22â†’class GifMediaDataSource
 23â†’@Inject constructor(
 24â†’    private val context: Context,
 25â†’    private val tenorClient: TenorGifClient,
 26â†’    private val uriUtilsWrapper: UriUtilsWrapper,
 27â†’    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 28â†’) : MediaSource {
 29â†’    private var nextPosition: Int = 0
 30â†’    private val items = mutableListOf<MediaItem>()
 31â†’    private var lastFilter: String? = null
 32â†’
 33â†’    override suspend fun load(forced: Boolean, loadMore: Boolean, filter: String?): MediaLoadingResult {
 34â†’        if (!loadMore) {
 35â†’            lastFilter = filter
 36â†’            items.clear()
 37â†’            nextPosition = 0
 38â†’        }
 39â†’
 40â†’        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 41â†’            return Failure(
 42â†’                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 43â†’                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 44â†’                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 45â†’                data = items
 46â†’            )
 47â†’        }
 48â†’
 49â†’        return if (!filter.isNullOrBlank()) {
 50â†’            suspendCoroutine { cont ->
 51â†’                tenorClient.search(filter,
 52â†’                    nextPosition,
 53â†’                    PAGE_SIZE,
 54â†’                    onSuccess = { response ->
 55â†’                        val gifList = response.results.map { it.toMediaItem() }
 56â†’
 57â†’                        items.addAll(gifList)
 58â†’                        val newPosition = response.next.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
 59â†’                        val hasMore = newPosition > nextPosition
 60â†’                        nextPosition = newPosition
 61â†’                        val result = if (items.isNotEmpty()) {
 62â†’                            Success(items.toList(), hasMore)
 63â†’                        } else {
 64â†’                            Empty(UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_empty_search_list))
 65â†’                        }
 66â†’                        cont.resume(result)
 67â†’                    },
 68â†’                    onFailure = {
 69â†’                        val errorMessage = it?.message
 70â†’                            ?: context.getString(R.string.gif_list_search_returned_unknown_error)
 71â†’                        cont.resume(
 72â†’                            Failure(
 73â†’                                UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 74â†’                                htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(errorMessage),
 75â†’                                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 76â†’                                data = items
 77â†’                            )
 78â†’                        )
 79â†’                    }
 80â†’                )
 81â†’            }
 82â†’        } else {
 83â†’            buildDefaultScreen()
 84â†’        }
 85â†’    }
 86â†’
 87â†’    private fun buildDefaultScreen(): MediaLoadingResult {
 88â†’        val title = UiStringRes(R.string.gif_picker_initial_empty_text)
 89â†’        return Empty(
 90â†’            title,
 91â†’            null,
 92â†’            R.drawable.img_illustration_media_105dp,
 93â†’            R.drawable.img_tenor_100dp,
 94â†’            UiStringRes(R.string.gif_powered_by_tenor)
 95â†’        )
 96â†’    }
 97â†’
 98â†’    private fun Result.toMediaItem() = MediaItem(
 99â†’        identifier = GifMediaIdentifier(
100â†’            uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF)),
101â†’            title
102â†’        ),
103â†’        url = uriUtilsWrapper.parse(urlFromCollectionFormat(MediaCollectionFormat.GIF_NANO)).toString(),
104â†’        type = IMAGE,
105â†’        dataModified = 0
106â†’    )
107â†’
108â†’    private fun Result.urlFromCollectionFormat(format: String) =
109â†’        medias.firstOrNull()?.get(format)?.url
110â†’
111â†’    companion object {
112â†’        private const val PAGE_SIZE = 36
113â†’    }
114â†’}

 39â†’@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 40â†’class MediaLibraryDataSource(
 41â†’    private val mediaStore: MediaStore,
 42â†’    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43â†’    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44â†’    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 45â†’    private val dateTimeUtilsWrapper: DateTimeUtilsWrapper,
 46â†’    private val siteModel: SiteModel,
 47â†’    override val mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>
 48â†’) : MediaSource, MediaSourceWithTypes {
 49â†’    init {
 50â†’        dispatcher.register(this)
 51â†’    }
 52â†’
 53â†’    private var loadContinuations = mutableMapOf<MimeType.Type, Continuation<OnMediaListFetched>>()
 54â†’
 55â†’    override suspend fun load(
 56â†’        forced: Boolean,
 57â†’        loadMore: Boolean,
 58â†’        filter: String?
 59â†’    ): MediaLoadingResult {
 60â†’        if (!networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
 61â†’            return Failure(
 62â†’                UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_title),
 63â†’                htmlSubtitle = UiStringRes(R.string.no_network_message),
 64â†’                image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 65â†’                data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 66â†’            )
 67â†’        }
 68â†’        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
 69â†’            val loadingResults = mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
 70â†’                async {
 71â†’                    loadPage(
 72â†’                        siteModel,
 73â†’                        loadMore,
 74â†’                        mediaType.toMimeType()
 75â†’                    )
 76â†’                }
 77â†’            }.awaitAll()
 78â†’
 79â†’            var error: String? = null
 80â†’            var hasMore = false
 81â†’            for (loadingResult in loadingResults) {
 82â†’                if (loadingResult.isError) {
 83â†’                    error = loadingResult.error.message
 84â†’                    break
 85â†’                } else {
 86â†’                    hasMore = hasMore || loadingResult.canLoadMore
 87â†’                }
 88â†’            }
 89â†’            if (error != null) {
 90â†’                Failure(
 91â†’                    UiStringRes(R.string.media_loading_failed),
 92â†’                    htmlSubtitle = UiStringText(error),
 93â†’                    image = R.drawable.img_illustration_cloud_off_152dp,
 94â†’                    data = if (loadMore) get(mediaTypes, filter) else listOf()
 95â†’                )
 96â†’            } else {
 97â†’                val data = get(mediaTypes, filter)
 98â†’                if (filter.isNullOrEmpty() || data.isNotEmpty()) {
 99â†’                    MediaLoadingResult.Success(data, hasMore)
100â†’                } else {
101â†’                    Empty(
102â†’                        UiStringRes(R.string.media_empty_search_list),
103â†’                        image = R.drawable.img_illustration_empty_results_216dp
104â†’                    )
105â†’                }
106â†’            }
107â†’        }
108â†’    }
109â†’
110â†’    private suspend fun get(mediaTypes: Set<MediaType>, filter: String?): List<MediaItem> {
111â†’        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
112â†’            mediaTypes.map { mediaType ->
113â†’                async {
114â†’                    if (filter == null) {
115â†’                        getFromDatabase(mediaType)
116â†’                    } else {
117â†’                        searchInDatabase(mediaType, filter)
118â†’                    }
119â†’                }
120â†’            }.fold(mutableListOf<MediaItem>()) { result, databaseItems ->
121â†’                result.addAll(databaseItems.await())
122â†’                result
123â†’            }.sortedByDescending { it.dataModified }
124â†’        }
125â†’    }
126â†’
127â†’    private fun List<MediaModel>.toMediaItems(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
128â†’        return this.filter { it.url.isNotBlank() }.map { mediaModel ->
129â†’            MediaItem(
130â†’                RemoteId(mediaModel.mediaId),
131â†’                mediaModel.url,
132â†’                mediaModel.title,
133â†’                mediaType,
134â†’                mediaModel.mimeType,
135â†’                mediaModel.uploadDate?.let { dateTimeUtilsWrapper.dateFromIso8601(it).time } ?: 0L
136â†’            )
137â†’        }
138â†’    }
139â†’
140â†’    private fun getFromDatabase(mediaType: MediaType): List<MediaItem> {
141â†’        return when (mediaType) {
142â†’            IMAGE -> mediaStore.getSiteImages(siteModel)
143â†’            VIDEO -> mediaStore.getSiteVideos(siteModel)
144â†’            AUDIO -> mediaStore.getSiteAudio(siteModel)
145â†’            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.getSiteDocuments(siteModel)
146â†’        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
147â†’    }
148â†’
149â†’    private fun searchInDatabase(mediaType: MediaType, filter: String): List<MediaItem> {
150â†’        return when (mediaType) {
151â†’            IMAGE -> mediaStore.searchSiteImages(siteModel, filter)
152â†’            VIDEO -> mediaStore.searchSiteVideos(siteModel, filter)
153â†’            AUDIO -> mediaStore.searchSiteAudio(siteModel, filter)
154â†’            DOCUMENT -> mediaStore.searchSiteDocuments(siteModel, filter)
155â†’        }.toMediaItems(mediaType)
156â†’    }
157â†’
158â†’    private suspend fun loadPage(siteModel: SiteModel, loadMore: Boolean, filter: MimeType.Type): OnMediaListFetched =
159â†’        suspendCoroutine { cont ->
160â†’            loadContinuations[filter] = cont
161â†’            val payload = FetchMediaListPayload(
162â†’                siteModel,
163â†’                NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH,
164â†’                loadMore,
165â†’                filter
166â†’            )
167â†’            dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaListAction(payload))
168â†’        }
169â†’
170â†’    private fun MediaType.toMimeType(): MimeType.Type {
171â†’        return when (this) {
172â†’            IMAGE -> MimeType.Type.IMAGE
173â†’            VIDEO -> MimeType.Type.VIDEO
174â†’            AUDIO -> MimeType.Type.AUDIO
175â†’            DOCUMENT -> MimeType.Type.APPLICATION
176â†’        }
177â†’    }
178â†’
179â†’    @Subscribe(threadMode = MAIN)
180â†’    fun onMediaListFetched(event: OnMediaListFetched) {
181â†’        loadContinuations[event.mimeType]?.resume(event)
182â†’        loadContinuations.remove(event.mimeType)
183â†’    }
184â†’

186â†’        const val NUM_MEDIA_PER_FETCH = 24
187â†’    }

content.text:
Implemented a minimal fix to remove the redundant â€śThere is no network availableâ€ť message wherever it was shown together with the â€śNo network availableâ€ť title.

Changes:
- **Media picker loaders** (`GifMediaDataSource.kt`, `MediaLibraryDataSource.kt`, `StockMediaDataSource.kt`): stopped passing `no_network_message` as `htmlSubtitle` for no-network failures (title-only now).
- **Self-hosted users offline UI** (`SelfHostedUserComposables.kt`): `OfflineView()` now shows only `no_network_title` (no subtitle).
- **History revisions empty state** (`HistoryListFragment.kt`): in `NO_NETWORK`, hides the subtitle instead of setting it to `no_network_message`.

 47â†’/**
 48â†’ * A composable that displays an avatar image optionally with a click listener. This
 49â†’ * is suitable for use in a list, such as in the self-hosted user list feature.
 50â†’ */
 51â†’@Composable
 52â†’fun SmallAvatar(
 53â†’    avatarUrl: String?,
 54â†’    onAvatarClick: ((String?) -> Unit)? = null,
 55â†’) {
 56â†’    val extraModifier = if (onAvatarClick != null) {
 57â†’        Modifier.clickable {
 58â†’            onAvatarClick(avatarUrl)
 59â†’        }
 60â†’    } else {
 61â†’        Modifier
 62â†’    }
 63â†’
 64â†’    if (avatarUrl.isNullOrEmpty()) {
 65â†’        Icon(
 66â†’            imageVector = ImageVector.vectorResource(id = R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24),
 67â†’            contentDescription = null,
 68â†’            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
 69â†’            modifier = Modifier
 70â†’                .size(48.dp)
 71â†’                .then(
 72â†’                    extraModifier
 73â†’                )
 74â†’        )
 75â†’    } else {
 76â†’        AsyncImage(
 77â†’            model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
 78â†’                .data(avatarUrl)
 79â†’                .error(R.drawable.ic_user_placeholder_primary_24)
 80â†’                .crossfade(true)
 81â†’                .build(),
 82â†’            contentScale = ContentScale.Fit,
 83â†’            contentDescription = null,
 84â†’            modifier = Modifier
 85â†’                .clip(CircleShape)
 86â†’                .size(48.dp)
 87â†’                .then(
 88â†’                    extraModifier
 89â†’                )
 90â†’        )
 91â†’    }
 92â†’}
